validated_commands.test_unit: uv run --with pytest pytest tests/unit -q --tb=short (note: PyPy 3.10 env; some tests fail due to env, not code)
validated_commands.lint_check: uv run --with ruff ruff check src/ tests/ && uv run --with ruff ruff format --check src/ tests/
validated_commands.lint_fix: uv run --with ruff ruff check src/ tests/ --fix && uv run --with ruff ruff format src/ tests/

env_notes: PyPy 3.10 env -- tracemalloc unavailable, jsonschema dev dep fails to build. CI uses CPython. Ignore PyPy-specific failures.
